title: What game is this PSP PS2 Demo
display_title: What game is this PSP PS2 Demo
wikitext:
[]: What game is this? PSP/PS2 Demo             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Wed May 26, 2010 10:54 am I got this from ebay and watched it but I can't tell what games the demos are from. Do the Japanese demos usually come on movie DVDs as oppose to game discs? I was wondering since all the demos I have from OPM Playstation and Playstation 2, and Saturn are only playable on the respective systems. thanks for the help.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Wed May 26, 2010 11:03 am It's says Evangelion: Jo. Must be a demo of that game. It also says something about a "Promotion Video" so that may be all it is. I dunno how Japanese demos usually work, but PS2 games all come on DVD.

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Wed May 26, 2010 1:28 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BY8PmhTgP9M

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Wed May 26, 2010 3:41 pm ZapX wrote: It's says Evangelion: Jo. Must be a demo of that game. It also says something about a "Promotion Video" so that may be all it is. I dunno how Japanese demos usually work, but PS2 games all come on DVD.
